description: Phase 2: AI Chat with dynamic data analysis — file upload, Mistral Large chat, inline chart rendering

userStories.title: Install AI SDK dependencies and create chat API route skeleton
userStories.description: As a developer, I need AI SDK packages installed and a basic /api/chat route streaming from Mistral Large.
acceptanceCriteria: ai and @ai-sdk/mistral packages installed in package.json
MISTRAL_API_KEY read from environment
POST /api/chat route at src/app/api/chat/route.ts accepts { messages } body
Route uses streamText with mistral('mistral-large-latest') and returns toDataStreamResponse()
Basic system prompt: construction data analysis assistant
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: env var MISTRAL_API_KEY should be added to .env.local. Use: import { mistral } from '@ai-sdk/mistral'; import { streamText } from 'ai';

userStories.title: Database schema for uploaded datasets and chat sessions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need DB tables to store user-uploaded data files parsed as JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: New table uploaded_datasets in src/lib/db/schema.ts: id(uuid), userId(uuid FK), category(varchar), fileName(varchar), sheets(jsonb), meta(jsonb), isActive(boolean), uploadedAt(timestamp)
Run npm run db:push to push schema to Neon successfully
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: sheets column stores: [{sheetName: string, columns: string[], rowCount: number, rows: Record<string,unknown>[]}]. Use existing drizzle.config.ts which loads .env.local via dotenv.

userStories.title: File upload API — parse CSV and XLSX to JSON
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API route that accepts file uploads, parses CSV/XLSX into JSON, and stores in DB.
acceptanceCriteria: papaparse and xlsx packages installed (plus @types/papaparse)
POST /api/upload route at src/app/api/upload/route.ts
Accepts multipart/form-data with file and category fields
CSV parsed with papaparse (header:true), XLSX all sheets parsed with xlsx
Each sheet stored as {sheetName, columns, rowCount, rows}
Saved to uploaded_datasets table with userId from Clerk auth
Returns JSON with id, fileName, category, sheets summary (no full rows in response)
Error handling: no file, unsupported format, parse failure
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use request.formData() for file access. CSV: new TextDecoder().decode(arrayBuffer). XLSX: read(arrayBuffer, {type:'array'}). Clerk auth: import { auth } from '@clerk/nextjs/server'.

userStories.title: Data Sources page — upload UI and dataset list
userStories.description: As a user, I want a page to upload my data files and see what I've uploaded.
acceptanceCriteria: New route /data-sources with page at src/app/(dashboard)/data-sources/page.tsx
Data Sources link added to sidebar navigation with appropriate icon
Two sections: PM Data and ERP Data, each with upload button and dataset list
Upload calls POST /api/upload with correct category
List shows: fileName, sheet count, row count, upload date per dataset
Delete button per dataset calls DELETE /api/upload/[id] route
DELETE /api/upload/[id] route implemented to remove from DB
Loading and success/error feedback during upload
Dark theme consistent with app
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Use 'use client' for upload interactions. Server component for initial data load. Add to sidebar in src/components/layout/sidebar.tsx. Use existing Card/Button from shadcn.

userStories.title: Chat page — full chat UI with useChat
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dedicated chat page to talk to the AI assistant.
acceptanceCriteria: New route /chat with page at src/app/(dashboard)/chat/page.tsx
AI Chat link added to sidebar navigation with MessageSquare icon
Full-height chat layout: scrollable messages + fixed input bar at bottom
Uses useChat hook from ai/react pointing to /api/chat
User messages right-aligned amber, assistant messages left-aligned
Streaming: tokens appear incrementally
Empty state: welcome message with suggestion prompts
Dark theme (slate-950 bg, slate-800 cards)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: useChat returns { messages, input, handleInputChange, handleSubmit, isLoading }. Message type has role and content. Scroll to bottom on new messages.

userStories.title: Wire uploaded data into chat context
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the chat API to load user datasets and include them in the AI system prompt.
acceptanceCriteria: /api/chat loads all uploaded_datasets for current user via Clerk auth
System prompt lists each dataset: fileName, category, sheets with columns and rowCount
For datasets fitting in context (<80K tokens est): full row data as JSON in prompt
For oversized datasets: schema + first 20 rows with truncation note
Token estimation: JSON.stringify(rows).length / 4
System prompt instructs AI about chart/table/kpi output formats
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Load datasets: db.select().from(uploadedDatasets).where(eq(uploadedDatasets.userId, appUserId)). Need to resolve Clerk userId to app user id, or store clerkId in uploaded_datasets directly.

userStories.title: Chart rendering in chat messages
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see charts inline in AI responses when visualization is appropriate.
acceptanceCriteria: System prompt instructs AI to output chart specs in ```chart code blocks
Chart spec: {type, title, xAxisKey, metrics: [{key, label, color?}], data: [...]}
Supported types: bar, line, area, pie, scatter, stacked-bar, composed
New component src/components/chat/chart-from-spec.tsx maps spec to Recharts
New component src/components/chat/message-renderer.tsx parses text+chart+table parts
Install react-markdown and remark-gfm for text rendering
Charts use dark theme (amber/blue/green palette, slate backgrounds)
Charts responsive: fill width, 300px height
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Parse content with regex: /```chart\n([\s\S]*?)```/g. Recharts components: BarChart, LineChart, AreaChart, PieChart, ScatterChart, ComposedChart. All need 'use client'.

userStories.title: Chat polish — tables, KPI badges, error handling
userStories.description: As a user, I want tables and KPIs in chat, plus graceful error handling.
acceptanceCriteria: AI can output ```table blocks: {headers: string[], rows: string[][]}
AI can output ```kpi blocks: {items: [{label, value, trend?, description?}]}
message-renderer handles chart, table, kpi block types
Tables use shadcn Table component with dark styling
KPI rendered as horizontal badge row
Malformed JSON in blocks falls back to plain code display
Error messages shown in chat on API failure
Clear chat button to reset conversation
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Reuse existing Table from src/components/ui/table.tsx. KPI badges similar to src/components/charts/evm-kpi-badges.tsx style.

userStories.title: End-to-end demo flow with sample data
userStories.description: As a hackathon judge, I want to see the complete upload→chat→chart flow work.
acceptanceCriteria: demo-data/pm-projects.csv created: 6 projects with name, type, status, city, dates, contract_value, percent_complete
demo-data/erp-financials.csv created: financial data with budget, actual_cost, committed, labor, material, subcontract costs
Both files uploadable via Data Sources page
Chat correctly answers: 'What data do I have?'
Chat correctly answers: 'Which project has the highest contract value?'
Chat produces bar chart for: 'Show budget vs actual cost chart'
Chat produces table for: 'Calculate cost variance for each project'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: This is the integration test story. Ensure dev server is running, upload files, then test chat interactions via browser. Demo data should have realistic construction values ($10M-$70M range).
